untranslatable_reason: Tick direction (uptick/downtick/zero-tick) is not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires comparison against 'last different price' and tracking of tick direction state, which requires custom tick tracking logic beyond standard OHLCV indicators. The 'dynamic limit price adjustment' and 'latch on direction reconfirmation' also require stateful execution logic not expressible in this schema.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about tick-level order conditioning and dynamic limit price management based on tick direction relative to the last different price. While the entry/exit logic structure attempts to express the directional intent, the core mechanism—tick classification and dynamic limit adjustment—cannot be properly represented using only OHLCV-derived indicators. Implementation requires a custom tick tracking module at the order execution layer.
